summary: The available information does not directly address whether sensation returns after microfat grafting; however, it implies that recovery may depend on local microvascular health and individual healing variability. Therefore, no definite conclusion can be drawn from current findings regarding tactile sensitivity reestablishment at the nasal tip post-surgery.
